title: Approval Trail Chip
prompt:
Create a production-ready Approval Trail Chip using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. Build a compact approval-status control that shows a three-step trail—Prepared, Reviewed, Approved—inside a light Bento card. Advancing the trail moves a blue stamp dot and changes the nearby status sentence; restarting returns to the first state. This is a useful deterministic micro-interaction, not an automatically looping progress indicator. Use a #F4F5F6 surround, white panel, #ECECEE border, 22px corners, soft neutral shadow, #111111 type, and #4A4A4F supporting copy. Blue is the only bright accent. Do not use gradients on the card or use color alone to communicate completion.

Use one real button with a minimum 44px target, plus a polite aria-live status. Click, Enter, and Space must advance or restart the exact same state. Hover lifts the button 2px over 180ms and press compresses it 1px over 90ms. Move the stamp dot using a spring with stiffness 350 and damping 28, then fade the status copy over 160ms. Each stage should have a numbered label and a distinct text description for reduced-motion users. Use local React state only; do not use timers, random values, browser storage, remote assets, or network calls.

At 320px, keep all stage labels readable and make the action full width. At larger widths, preserve a compact chip-like composition with calm whitespace. Maintain logical focus order, AA contrast, and a visible 3px dark focus ring. Prefer transform and opacity. Honor prefers-reduced-motion with instant stage movement or a 120ms fade. Return complete TypeScript React client code and a runnable pure CSS approximation with suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* Suggested HTML:
01 Prepared
*/ .uiwiki-approval{max-width:340px;padding:20px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:22px;background:#fff}.uiwiki-approval span{display:inline-block;min-height:44px;padding:10px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:12px;font:800 12px system-ui}.uiwiki-approval span:first-child{border-top:4px solid #2563eb}.uiwiki-approval button{min-height:44px;width:100%;margin-top:16px;border:0;border-radius:12px;background:#111;color:#fff;font-weight:800}.uiwiki-approval button:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.uiwiki-approval *{transition:none}}
